properties.description: Returns the amount of pressure in the Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage, in kiloPascals.
Returns the temperature of the gasses inside a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage, in Kelvin.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of oxygen in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of carbon dioxide in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of nitrogen in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of pollutant in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of volatiles in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of water in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of nitrousoxide in the gasses in a Gas Canister in the Gas Tank Storage.
Returns number of moles of gas in the canister
Returns whether the slot occupied. (0 for no, 1 for yes).
Returns ItemHash of item in slot.
